warnings: Asset size limit warnings (editor.js 336 KiB) - expected for theme bundles

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP structure re-verified after fixes. Both use auto-extracted attribute variables with fallback defaults. Unused variables removed from TSX.

fixesApplied.description: PHP template manually extracted attributes from $attributes array instead of using auto-extracted variables
fixesApplied.action: Replaced `$showExcerpt = $attributes['showExcerpt'] ?? false;` and `$useTopicColor = $attributes['useTopicColor'] ?? false;` with `$showExcerpt = $showExcerpt ?? false;` and `$useTopicColor = $useTopicColor ?? false;` to use auto-extracted variables with null-coalescing fallback.

fixesApplied.description: PHP template missing @var docblock for camelCase attribute variables
fixesApplied.action: Updated docblock to document auto-extracted attribute variables: @var string|null $anchor, @var bool $showExcerpt, @var bool $useTopicColor.

fixesApplied.description: Unused variables in PostHero.tsx: postId and featuredMediaId
fixesApplied.action: Removed unused 'postId' from useSelect destructuring (now returns post directly). Removed unused 'featuredMediaId' variable (only featuredMediaUrl is used).
